current.summary: Built provider monitoring pipeline end-to-end: source manifests (12 providers, 147 URLs), provider-monitor Go tool, _genproviders CLI command, and sync-providers.ts for docs site. All verified and tested.

activeWork.description: Provider capability data pipeline — source manifests → monitor tool → providers.json → docs site sync
activeWork.progress: Core pipeline complete and shipping. Source manifests verified (147/147 URLs). Go monitor tool built and tested. _genproviders command exports provider capabilities as JSON. sync-providers.ts generates MDX pages for docs site. All committed and pushed. Capability schema draft written but needs expansion (hook events, frontmatter fields, tool name mappings). Change classification pipeline not started.

recentDecisions: YAML + JSON Schema for source manifests (human-readable with validation)
One file per provider for source manifests (not monolithic)
Codegen-only (option A) for capability data — no runtime loader. Provider data baked into binary via go generate.
Provider capability export follows same pattern as commands.json: _genproviders command → providers.json → sync-providers.ts → MDX pages
Change classification taxonomy: additive (auto-PR), modify (review PR), removal (issue), behavioral (issue)
nextSteps: Write the plan for docs site provider pages — what needs to happen in syllago-docs to fully surface the provider data (matrix page, provider detail pages, hook event matrix, comparison component)
Expand capability schema draft to include hook events, frontmatter fields, tool name mappings (the Layer 2 data haiku validated as incomplete)
Build change classification pipeline (detect additive vs breaking changes when provider data updates)
Wire provider-monitor into CI as daily cron job

context.notes: The docs site repo is at ../syllago-docs/. sync-providers.ts is already written and tested — it generates all 12 provider pages from providers.json. The sidebar.ts was updated (Copilot slug fixed, Amp added). The site builds clean. The capability-schema-draft.yaml has 6 open design questions at the bottom — platform-specific paths, hook detail level, and tool name mappings are the biggest. Haiku validation found significant gaps in the draft: hook types (4 not 1), frontmatter fields (12+ per type not 2), MCP transports (4 not 3). These need to be addressed before the schema is finalized.

previousSessions.summary: Phase D Add Wizard complete + bug fixes (mouse support, hook/MCP discovery) + mouse parity rule added to 4 doc files + UX Polish bead chain created (11 beads).
nextSteps: Add Wizard UX Polish plan bead (syllago-76jtp)
Nav buttons, proper tables, button reorder, helpbar override, installed-item filtering

previousSessions.summary: Hooks specification v0.1 finalized: all 17 v0.1 items completed, changelog updated, file renamed from hooks-v1.md to hooks.md
completedWork: All 17 hooks spec v0.1 items completed
